\tzpentry{ID5275}{Dipole Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5275 introduces Dipole Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(A_{\text{dipole}} = (\mu_0/4\pi) \mu_{\text{eff}}(t) \times (r - r_{\text{cm}})/|r-r_{\text{cm}}|^3\)
\]
